name: IRS Exempt Organizations Business Master File - Maryland
description: Current IRS Business Master File extract for Maryland tax-exempt organizations. Useful for nonprofit headquarters, EINs, exemption type, NTEE code, assets, income, and revenue.
join_strategy: Geocode STREET/CITY/STATE/ZIP to parcel, CSA, or census geography; use EIN as stable organization key.
license_note: Official public IRS dataset; verify field meanings against the bundled IRS EO BMF guide.

name: IRS EO BMF Dataset Guide
description: Official IRS field guide for EO BMF columns and code meanings.

name: IRS Form 990 XML - 2026 Part 01A
description: Nationwide machine-readable Form 990 XML filings. Large raw source for nonprofit revenue, expenses, assets, grants, officers, and contractor data.
join_strategy: Filter by EINs from the Maryland EO BMF or by filer address before deriving local nonprofit-flow records.

name: IRS Form 990 XML - 2026 Part 02A
description: Second current-year nationwide Form 990 XML archive. Skipped by default because it is large.
join_strategy: Filter by EINs from the Maryland EO BMF or by filer address before deriving local nonprofit-flow records.

name: ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer API
reason: API/source documentation; query by EIN/name/city when deriving nonprofit summaries.
description: Convenience API for nonprofit profiles and processed Form 990 summaries. Useful for enrichment, not a replacement for IRS bulk data.

name: USAspending Awards API
reason: API source; use POST filters for Baltimore, Maryland, recipient type, award type, and fiscal year.
description: Federal grants/contracts/loans and other awards. Useful for government capital inflows to nonprofits, city agencies, universities, and businesses.

name: HUD LIHTC Property Database
reason: Download page uses an interactive/challenged endpoint; fetch manually or add a confirmed direct URL before automation.
description: Property-level Low-Income Housing Tax Credit projects with address, units, allocation year, placed-in-service year, geocoding, and financing characteristics.
join_strategy: Geocode project address to parcel; aggregate to CSA or census tract for housing-investment layers.

name: FFIEC CRA Flat Files
reason: Download catalog; select year/product before downloading large flat files.
description: Small business, small farm, and community development lending by geography and lender. Best represented as census-tract or MSA overlays.

name: CDFI Fund Awards Database
reason: Interactive/search source; derive Maryland/Baltimore awardee records with a dedicated fetcher later.
description: CDFI, Capital Magnet Fund, Bank Enterprise Award, Bond Guarantee, Native Initiatives, and New Markets Tax Credit award information.
